commands: ROOT="$PWD"; while [ "$ROOT" != "/" ] && [ ! -f "$ROOT/pnpm-workspace.yaml" ]; do ROOT="$(dirname "$ROOT")"; done; echo "[bot][install] start pwd=$(pwd)"; echo "[bot][install] workspace root=$ROOT"; [ -f "$ROOT/pnpm-workspace.yaml" ] || { echo "[bot][install] workspace root not found"; exit 1; }; cd "$ROOT" && echo "[bot][install] run pwd=$(pwd)" && corepack enable && corepack pnpm@10.12.1 install --frozen-lockfile

ROOT="$PWD"; while [ "$ROOT" != "/" ] && [ ! -f "$ROOT/pnpm-workspace.yaml" ]; do ROOT="$(dirname "$ROOT")"; done; echo "[bot][build] start pwd=$(pwd)"; echo "[bot][build] workspace root=$ROOT"; [ -f "$ROOT/pnpm-workspace.yaml" ] || { echo "[bot][build] workspace root not found"; exit 1; }; cd "$ROOT" && echo "[bot][build] run pwd=$(pwd)" && corepack enable && corepack pnpm@10.12.1 --filter bot run build

deploy.startCommand: ROOT="$PWD"; while [ "$ROOT" != "/" ] && [ ! -f "$ROOT/pnpm-workspace.yaml" ]; do ROOT="$(dirname "$ROOT")"; done; echo "[bot][start] start pwd=$(pwd)"; echo "[bot][start] workspace root=$ROOT"; [ -f "$ROOT/pnpm-workspace.yaml" ] || { echo "[bot][start] workspace root not found"; exit 1; }; cd "$ROOT" && echo "[bot][start] run pwd=$(pwd)" && corepack enable && corepack pnpm@10.12.1 --filter bot run start
